LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF FRANCESCA SIMONE'S MOTION/APP. FOR RELIEF PURSUANT TO GOVT. CODE 946.6. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. GRANT RELIEF PER GOVERNMENT CODE 946.6. SERIOUS MEDICAL CONDITION LAST BRAIN SURGERY/TREATMENT FEBRUARY AND MARCH 2006. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/REQ/JU)JOAN BRYCE
